steps.title: Identify the key operations
steps.content: Twice indicates multiplication by 2, so twice the value of x is $2x$. 49 more than indicates addition of 49.

steps.title: Build the equation
steps.content: Combining these operations: $y$ equals twice the value of x plus 49, which is $y = 2x + 49$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
